Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽。扰魔 亡语：对你的英雄造成10点伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 剧毒。扰魔 你的英雄免疫。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deftly dodges spells like a real wiggle wyrm.
Tag.zhCN: 八百巨龙奔北坡，北坡法师并排跑。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Why Beryllium? Because it's hard to spell.
Tag.zhCN: 为什么要用铍？因为这个字难拼，进而难以被选中。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Millennia of evolutionary pressures turned his species into the Faerie Dragons we know today.
Tag.zhCN: 历经数千年的演变后，它变成了我们现在所熟知的精灵龙。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deftly dodges spells like a real wiggle wyrm.
Tag.zhCN: 八百巨龙奔北坡，北坡法师并排跑。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.zhCN: 总计赢得500场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 它的分类让生物学家很是头疼。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Unlocked after winning 50 games as Hunter.
Tag.zhCN: 使用猎人赢得50场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Adorable. Immune to Magic. Doesn't pee on the rug. The perfect pet!
Tag.zhCN: 可爱至极，免疫魔法，不会在毯子上撒尿。真是完美的宠物！

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.zhCN: 总计赢得500场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 那种没人在意你的感觉，是永远的痛。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.zhCN: 与萨满祭司职业一同解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Unlocked after winning 50 games as Shaman.
Tag.zhCN: 使用萨满祭司赢得50场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "I am the great Stone Drake - good morning!"

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Taunt, Elusive Deathrattle: Give all minions in your hand and deck +3/+3.
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽。扰魔 亡语：使你的手牌和牌库里的所有随从牌获得+3/+3。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "Let your heart guide you. It whispers, so listen closely."

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: One head only tells the truth, while the other head only tells lies. But they both spit poison.
Tag.zhCN: 一个头只说真话，另一个头只说假话。不过两个头都很毒舌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: I've never heard of this fey-dragon called "Brightwing," but if I HAD, I’d say we’d be best friends.
Tag.zhCN: 我从没听说过这只叫“光明之翼”的精灵龙。但如果我听过的话，我一定要说：我们是最好的朋友。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deftly dodges spells like a real wiggle wyrm.
Tag.zhCN: 八百巨龙奔北坡，北坡法师并排跑。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Doesn't respond to spells, hero powers, calls, or text messages.
Tag.zhCN: 法术，英雄技能，还有电话，短信，统统不接。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Nevergreen Stag has Enrage, Overkill, and Honorable Kill.
Tag.zhCN: 非常青雄鹿拥有激怒，超杀，以及荣誉消灭。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive At the end of your turn, get a random Dragon.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。在你的回合结束时，随机获取一张龙牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Shouldn't this have like, a thousand times more attack?
Tag.zhCN: 这张牌的攻击力本该是现在的一千倍吧？

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Taunt, Elusive After this takes damage, gain 1 Armor and give this minion +1 Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽。扰魔 在本随从受到伤害后，获得1点护甲值并使本随从获得+1攻击力。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Tortolla survived the Burning Legion’s invasion unscathed, but the Nightmare’s corruption really got under his shell.
Tag.zhCN: 托尔托拉在燃烧军团的入侵中毫发无损，但梦魇的腐蚀却深深地穿透了他的防备。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive, Taunt Costs (1) less for each Mana Crystal you've _Overloaded this game.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。嘲讽。在本局对战中，你每过载一个法力水晶，本牌的法力值消耗便减少（1）点。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: This minion is full of bugs.

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: What do Faerie Dragons and Spectral Knights have in common? They both love pasta!
Tag.zhCN: 精灵龙和鬼灵骑士有什么共同之处？它们的名字里都有“灵”字！

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.enUS: Unlocked in The Military Quarter, in the Naxxramas adventure.
Tag.zhCN: 加入“纳克萨玛斯的诅咒”冒险模式，在军事区中解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Crafting unlocked in The Military Quarter, in the Naxxramas adventure.
Tag.zhCN: 加入“纳克萨玛斯的诅咒”冒险模式，在军事区中解锁制作。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。战吼：召唤所有接邻的乘务员。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Elusive, Taunt Spellburst: Give your hero +8 Attack this turn and gain 8 Armor.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。嘲讽 法术迸发：使你的英雄获得本回合中的+8攻击力，并获得8点护甲值。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Star gazing and star grazing aren't too different. Except for the part where you eat stars.
Tag.zhCN: 观星和吞星没什么区别。一个是收入目中，一个是收入腹中。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: There was some hard talk between gnome magi and engineers about inventing this mech.
Tag.zhCN: 在将这款机械装置投入生产之前，侏儒工程师们与法师们不知进行了多少次谈判。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 它的分类让生物学家很是头疼。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Someone really put their heart into making this.
Tag.zhCN: 这只小熊真的是用心做成的。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive After you cast a spell, cast a random spell that costs (1) more.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。在你施放一个法术后，随机施放一个法力值消耗增加（1）点的法术。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Darkmoon Magicians pull rabbits out of their hats, and wins out of their... hats.
Tag.zhCN: 暗月魔术师能从帽子里变出兔子，还有……胜利。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Taunt, Elusive Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, gain +7/+7.
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽，扰魔 战吼：如果你有十个法力水晶，获得+7/+7。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Dr. Boom was definitely a dinosaur kid.
Tag.zhCN: 砰砰博士小时候绝对是个恐龙少年。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Adorable. Immune to Magic. Doesn't pee on the rug. The perfect pet!
Tag.zhCN: 可爱至极，免疫魔法，不会在毯子上撒尿。真是完美的宠物！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Don't tell Soggoth, but in the future he gets totally owned by the Master's Glaive and his skull becomes a tourist attraction.
Tag.zhCN: 千万别告诉索苟斯将来它会被主宰之剑给干掉，还有它的颅骨后来成为了艾泽拉斯非常热门的旅游景点……

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Don't strike until you see the whites of their teeth.

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Elusive Deathrattle: Advance fight and restore 15 Health to Thrall.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。亡语：推进战斗，并为萨尔恢复15点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Elusive Deathrattle: Restore 2 Health to all friendly characters.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。亡语：为所有友方角色恢复2点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive At the end of your turn, deal 1 damage to all enemy minions. Deathrattle: Advance fight.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。在你的回合结束时，对所有敌方随从造成1点伤害。亡语：推进战斗。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Destroy his head to win the game, but watch out for fireballs!
Tag.zhCN: 摧毁无头骑士的头可以赢得比赛，但要小心火球！

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Destroy his head to win the game, but watch out for fireballs!
Tag.zhCN: 摧毁无头骑士的头可以赢得比赛，但要小心火球！

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive After you cast a spell, Discover a Nature spell from the past.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。在你施放一个法术后，发现一张来自过去的自然法术牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: For two weeks, she meditated in silence, undisturbed as she peered into the endless, unfolding facets of the universe. No pathway lay unexplored, no stone left unturned. When she finally snapped from her fugue, she uttered a single word: "Woah."
Tag.zhCN: 她冥想了两个星期，心无旁骛地探知着宇宙的每一个角落，事无巨细，无所不包。当她从冥想中醒来，口中只吐出了一个声音：“喔。”

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。战吼：召唤两个2/1并具有扰魔的悖论活体。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: We just need to find the right clone to pin this all on.
Tag.zhCN: 只要找到正确的复制体就可以了。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Earnable on the Across the Timeways Tavern Pass.
Tag.zhCN: 购买穿越时间流炉石通行证后开放解锁。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 突袭。扰魔 战吼：召唤一个本随从的复制。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Look out! It's at your 6 o'clock!

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Elusive Deathrattle: Summon a Blood Fighter from your hand. Give it +5/+5 and Elusive.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。亡语：从你的手牌中召唤一位血斗士，使其获得+5/+5和扰魔。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 可完美用于处埋舌L石马！

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽。扰魔 战吼：召唤一个本随从的复制。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: OMG, I FINALLY GOT A SHINING SENTINEL AFTER 3 PHASES AND 8192 RESETS!!!!!
Tag.zhCN: 我歪了3回，刷了8192次，终于抓到了闪光的岩哨兵！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 那种没人在意你的感觉，是永远的痛。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Millennia of evolutionary pressures turned his species into the Faerie Dragons we know today.
Tag.zhCN: 历经数千年的演变后，它变成了我们现在所熟知的精灵龙。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Rush, Elusive Can only take 1 damage at a time.
Tag.zhCN: 突袭。扰魔。每次只能受到1点伤害。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Adorable. Immune to Magic. Doesn't pee on the rug. The perfect pet!
Tag.zhCN: 可爱至极，免疫魔法，不会在毯子上撒尿。真是完美的宠物！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Take these broken wings, be reborn, and learn to fly again.
Tag.zhCN: 就算冰雪覆盖，我也不怕重来，我已不是那个懵懂的幼崽。
